name: Malta Set of 2 Wicker Patio Dining Chair with Cushion- Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Iron Frame, Foam Cushion
description:
Relish the outdoors with a set of chairs just as unique as your outdoor patio with this wicker dining chair set. This set offers a solid foundation of metal and resin wicker and water-resistant fabric that is not only trendy but functional. Whether you are entertaining guests or simply enjoying the outdoors, this dining chair set is sure to satisfy.

TRANSITIONAL STYLE: With a simple yet outstanding woven rattan design, these dining chairs offer your outdoor space a perfect blend of modern and classic elements.

POLYETHYLENE RATTAN: Featuring a long-lasting woven finish, this style is incredibly durable and provides a versatile appearance.

WEATHER RESISTANT: These dining chairs are designed and tested to resist mild weather conditions. We always advise covering, storing, or providing other protection to our furniture in the event of heavy or repeated exposure to the elements, including water and UV rays.

DIMENSIONS: Each chair is 23.25” W x 24.00” D x 33.00” H.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
